rightsEvidence.basis: Paid-plan speech output may be used commercially; Flightglass owns the cue copy and uses a generated Voice Design identity, not a cloned third-party voice.

productionGuide: Mature American male color-analyst (former-pro-in-the-booth); neutral General American; dark baritone; conversational expert authority that explains rather than hypes; dry warmth, 138-146 wpm with deliberate inter-sentence pauses. Never play-by-play, motivational, gravelly or broadcaster-slick.

assets.durationReviewNote: Reviewed at 8.4 seconds (4A voice): one complete technical sentence at the veteran-teacher pace, no removable pause.
Reviewed at 9.3 seconds (4A voice): one complete technical sentence, clear at low volume, with no removable pause or redundant wording.
Reviewed at 8.2 seconds (4A voice): one complete technical sentence at the veteran-teacher pace, no removable pause.
Reviewed at 8.1 seconds (4A voice): one complete technical sentence at the veteran-teacher pace, no removable pause.
Reviewed at 9.6 seconds (4A voice): the model-boundary warning remains intact and the explicit Flight glass pronunciation is clear.
